scripts.verify: turbo run verify && pnpm run depcruise:frontend && pnpm run drift:check
scripts.drift:check: turbo run codegen && git diff --exit-code -- packages/shared-types/src/generated apps/backend/docs/openapi && u=$(git -c core.quotePath=false ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- packages/shared-types/src/generated apps/backend/docs/openapi) && { test -z "$u" || { echo 'drift:check: 계약·생성물 경로에 untracked 파일 존재(생성물은 커밋한다):'; printf '%s\n' "$u"; false; }; }
